evidence: I tend to like sci-fi shows and this has quite a combination of factors, love story, action and extra-terrestrials.
I am a sucker for a love story with SciFi.
the writers need to look over the books, because there is a reason why, despite the many characters, convoluted plots, and to some extent boring drawn out stories the books are read.
the story line could be improved.
my daughter thought it was slow, but that is how some shows are.
When you first start to watch it does not hold your interest, but as the movie progresses there is something about it that resonates with you.
the all consuming love of a woman for a man above all else.
Ashley Judd is always a favourite with me.
This is a show to be watched on a large screen to fully appreciate.
An emotional story about the plight in Ireland and the love engendered by the people for their country.
It appeals to me because the cause is one worth fighting for.
A lovely love story. Recommended for people who loves love stories.

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi, drama, and romance genres, often appreciating well-acted and emotionally resonant stories. They enjoy narratives that combine action with deeper themes, although they have mixed feelings about pacing and narrative complexity.
